meaning: vt.鍗歌揣,鍗镐笅閲嶆媴,琛ㄧ櫧,鍚愰湶
examples: She needed to unburden herself to somebody.
He listened to his parents unburden themselves in therapy.
Aileen began at once to unburden her feelings.
Two important takeaways: Sprint is finally going unburden itself of having to operate two incompatible networks.
At a second inquiry, Lo got a chance to unburden himself.
